{#- Inline SVG icon for a single author link entry. The caller is expected to have `link` in scope (with at least a `kind` key). Kept as a partial so the icon set lives in one place. -#} {% if link.kind == "github" %} {% elif link.kind == "twitter" or link.kind == "x" %} {% elif link.kind == "mastodon" %} {% elif link.kind == "bluesky" %} {% elif link.kind == "linkedin" %} {% elif link.kind == "email" %} {% else %} {% endif %}
